Scientists confirm she was already at dangerous levels of charm — the world, baffled, is simply grateful to exist in her timeline
Scientists Confirm: World Significantly Better Since Her Arrival
By Our Chief Correspondent ✦ Special Report

A landmark study released this morning has confirmed what everyone who has ever met Akshu already knew — the world has been measurably, undeniably better since she arrived in it.

Researchers noted her warmth, her infectious laugh, and what one professor described as “chubby cheeks so disarming they should be classified as a natural phenomenon.”

👆 click — this one is about her warmth
✦ THE SUNSHINE QUALITY ✦
She is the kind of person who makes every room warmer simply by walking in. Her smile has been known to fix bad days. Her laugh is the kind you remember forever. She is your sunshine, your sugarplum, your honey bunch — and she has absolutely no idea how rare that is.

The study concluded simply: “She makes things better. We don't understand it. We are just grateful.”

Studious Beauty Shatters Every Expectation Simultaneously
By Our Education Correspondent ✦ Exclusive

Sources confirm Akshu is not just breathtakingly beautiful — she is also extraordinarily studious, often found with books open while everyone else has given up.

👆 click — the sensible soul
✦ THE MATURE MIND ✦
She is the most mature, sensible, understanding person in any room — and somehow also the most fun. She listens when it matters. She gives advice that actually makes sense. She tells you the truth with kindness. She is the rare kind who is both brilliant and warm.

Colleagues confirm she manages to look stunning while doing all of it, which experts call “completely unreasonable.”

Cricket Queen
Reports confirm she plays cricket better than most. Our sports desk calls her “terrifyingly competitive in the best possible way.”
👆 the fire in her
✦ THE FIERCE ONE ✦
She plays to win. She gives everything. Whether it's cricket on the field or a debate in the room — she shows up fully. That fire in her is one of the most beautiful things about her.
Food. Always Food.
“Her eyes light up around food the way the sun lights up the sky” — everyone who has ever eaten with her.
👆 the foodie chapter
✦ THE FOODIE ✦
She doesn't just eat food. She experiences it. She talks about it. She appreciates it with her whole heart. Watching her enjoy a meal is genuinely one of life's great pleasures.
Sleepyhead Supreme
Official sources confirm she is the world's most dedicated sleepyhead — and manages to look adorable doing it.
👆 once she's comfortable
✦ THE REAL HER ✦
Once she is comfortable with you — and it takes a little time — she becomes the best person to be around. Funny, warm, easy, real. The kind of friend you can sit in silence with and still feel completely connected.
The Akshu Times ✦ Est. April 30 “ Written with love, delivered with joy ” All facts herein are absolutely true ✦
